title: Silhouette Universe
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for symbolic compositions where a crisp black silhouette becomes a container for an entire narrative world.

en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for symbolic compositions where a crisp black silhouette becomes a container for an entire narrative world.

zh-CN.title: Silhouette Universe · 剪影宇宙
zh-CN.description: 测试黑色剪影作为叙事容器的象征性构图,让塔、门和骷髅轮廓内部承载完整世界。
